description: Braintree Drop-in UI — pre-built payment form with minimal setup

client_sdk.note: Check latest version at Braintree docs

required_parameters.container: CSS selector or DOM element for the Drop-in UI

payment_flow.step_1: Server: Generate client token via gateway.clientToken.generate()
payment_flow.step_3: Buyer: Selects payment method and fills in details

customization.styles: Limited CSS customization — use Hosted Fields for full control
customization.vaulted_methods: Pass customerId in client token to show saved payment methods

events.paymentMethodRequestable: Fired when a payment method is available
events.noPaymentMethodRequestable: Fired when no payment method is available
events.paymentOptionSelected: Fired when buyer selects a payment option

best_practices: Always call requestPaymentMethod() only on form submit
Show loading state while Drop-in initializes
Generate fresh client tokens per session
